lbl_incluir_sin_ano: Include docs without a detected year
msg_indexacion_abortada: Indexing stopped by user. Progress saved.
lbl_que_deseas_borrar: What do you want to delete?
lbl_accion_irreversible: I understand this action is irreversible.
msg_indice_vacio: The index is already completely empty.
msg_selecciona_borrar: Select whether to delete everything or just one folder.
msg_indice_borrado_todo: Complete index deleted successfully. Ready to start from scratch.
msg_selecciona_carpeta: Please select at least one folder.
msg_limite_excedido: ⚠️ Found more than {} results ({} total). Please apply an additional year or folder filter to narrow down the results, or include more keywords.
msg_sin_resultados: No results found for those filters.
msg_busqueda_exito: 🎯 Success! The word generated {} hits. Showing page {}.
desc_config_metodo: Select how you want the engine to deduce the historical year when indexing.
desc_config_limite: Set the maximum limit of results before the system asks you to refine the search. This prevents excessive load times in massive repositories.
lbl_limite_maximo: Maximum limit of results per search
desc_tamanio_db: Larger files speed up searches. Smaller files are easier to backup to the cloud.
help_desc: Che PDF allows you to efficiently index and search text within historical PDF documents, even in large-volume repositories.
help_paso1_desc: Before starting, go to the 'Settings' tab and select the extraction method for the historical year (name, folder, or metadata). This is vital for the time filter.
help_paso2_desc: Use the 'Create new indexed folder' button (folder icon with a '+') on the left panel to select the root folder containing your PDFs. The process will start automatically. Watch the System Monitor for progress.
help_paso3_desc: Once indexed, use the slider ('Time Filter') to narrow down by year range or the checkboxes to select only certain folders.
help_paso4_desc: Enter your term in the top bar. If there are too many results (based on your Settings limit), the system will ask you to refine the search.
help_paso5_desc: Click on a document title to open it in your default browser, directly to the correct page with the term highlighted.
help_sintaxis_desc: The engine supports the powerful SQLite FTS5 syntax:
help_sintaxis_frase: • Exact phrase: Use quotes. E.g.: "ministry of defense"
help_sintaxis_and: • AND operator: search for words together (default). E.g.: condor AND act
help_sintaxis_or: • OR operator: search for one or the other. E.g.: prisoner OR detainee
help_sintaxis_not: • NOT operator: exclude a word. E.g.: condor NOT paraguay
about_licencia: • License: GNU GPLv3 (Free Software) - You are free to use, study, share, and modify this software for any purpose.
about_desarrollo: This application was developed by sitiosdememoria.uy to facilitate the analysis and research of large documentary volumes. It has a free software license that allows its use, study, dissemination, and modification, as part of the project's commitment to the struggles for memory, truth, and justice.
about_desc: Advanced document indexing and search engine, designed to process large volumes of PDF files.
donate_desc: Che PDF is and will always be a free and open-source tool. Your voluntary contribution helps us maintain our infrastructure, develop new tools, and continue the militant work of researching and preserving historical memory.
